description: Default classification for configlint rule_id values. default_aggregate_escalates must match hf_bundle_scanner.dispatch.CONFIG_RISK_RULE_IDS (enforced by hf_bundle_scanner/tests/test_configlint_policy_template.py).

rules.notes: Fix JSON before trusting other loader fields; blocks default bundle aggregate today.
Worst-case static loader posture in default CI; treat as security + legal, not a hyperparameter.
Unexpected class wiring / provenance story; blocking in default CI today.
Credential-in-config posture; informational in default CI today.
Legacy fast tokenizer path; audits/reproducibility, not RCE-by-itself.
Explicit opt-out of safetensors; pairs with pickle-era weight risk in threat models.
